prompt: I have an existing progress.md from before the RPG update. It has Student Info, Topic Mastery, and Scorecard History but no RPG Profile or Achievements sections. I'm on Day 12, Phase 1.

assertions.name: detects-old-format
assertions.description: Recognizes the progress.md is missing RPG sections

assertions.name: adds-rpg-profile
assertions.description: Adds RPG Profile with correct defaults (Title based on current phase)

assertions.name: retroactive-achievements
assertions.description: Scans existing data and retroactively unlocks earned achievements

assertions.name: welcome-message
assertions.description: Shows a 'Welcome to ScaleUp!' message with unlocked achievements

assertions.name: no-learning-interruption
assertions.description: Does not interrupt learning flow — migrates and continues with normal session
